# interview-question-tracker-speckit Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-03-22

## Active Technologies
- JavaScript (ES2022+), Vue 3.5 + Vue 3, Vite 5, Tailwind CSS 4, @vue/test-utils 2, Vitest 2 (003-multi-category-selection)
- Browser localStorage (via `useLocalStorage` composable) (003-multi-category-selection)

- JavaScript (ES2022+) with Vue 3.4+ (Composition API) + Vue 3, Vite 5, Tailwind CSS 3 (001-interview-question-tracker)

## Project Structure

```text
backend/
frontend/
tests/
```

## Commands

npm test; npm run lint

## Code Style

JavaScript (ES2022+) with Vue 3.4+ (Composition API): Follow standard conventions
